chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-394 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 20.05.2025 Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Hamid Ali Abro, Assistant Accountant and Naeem Ahmed, Senior Auditor, District Accounts Office, Larkano. ------ In compliance of the directions contained under previous order, the officers present, submit that they have recalculated the amount of the petitioner and no difference has been found; however, petitioner being not satisfied submits that there is much difference between his claim as well as calculation made by the official respondents. The controversy so raised by claim of the petitioner requires evidence, for which this Court has no jurisdiction to record evidence being barred by Article 212 of the Constitution, Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby disposed of; however, the petitioner is at liberty to file appropriate proceedings before the forum having jurisdiction, if so advised. Judge Judge Manzoor
